title: Mercury MAG01 | Heavy Duty Helping Hand with 3 x Zoom Magnifying Glass, Silver
features: Fully adjustable clips and arms for perfect product placement
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | Heavy Duty Helping Hand with 3 x Zoom Magnifying Glass Convenient and very useful tool for giving extra support whilst performing precision soldering jobs and many other applications. Robust metal stand complete with two fully adjustable arms, with crocodile clips hands and a magnifying glass with 3 x zoom. PRODUCT FEATURES & SPECIFICATION: The perfect partner for any modellers and arts and craft enthusiast Sturdy and strong crocodile clips hold work firmly in place Exact positioning always acheived from fully adjustable arms Strong heavy cast base gives you security and stability Dimensions 260 x 65 x 180mm Weight 336g
